description: At the end of the year, an editor wants to create a collection of the publication's 10 best investigative reports from that year.

nodes.task_description: Search the archive for all articles published in the last year with the tag 'investigative'.

expected_outcome.value: A list of all investigative pieces is generated.

nodes.task_description: Review the list with senior editors to select the 10 most impactful reports.

expected_outcome.value: A curated list of the top 10 stories is created.

nodes.task_description: Create a new 'collection' page in the CMS.

expected_outcome.value: A new page is created to house the collection.

nodes.task_description: Add links and summaries for the 10 selected articles to the collection page and publish it.

expected_outcome.value: The 'Best of the Year' collection is live.
